category_sources: source_facts.description says msolve is a library for Polynomial System Solving through Algebraic Methods; official site says it solves multivariate polynomial systems using computer algebra.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is msolve; official site and repository use msolve/MSOLVE.
docs_sources: Official msolve site links Docs and Examples; GitHub README also points to https://msolve.lip6.fr/ and tutorial material.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo lookup was intentionally not performed per instruction.
tags_sources: Official site lists computer algebra, exact polynomial system solving, Groebner bases algorithms, multithreading, and GPLv2+; source_facts.description identifies algebraic polynomial-system solving.
